Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**

Reference : "Initial Semantics for Strengthened Signatures" (André Hirschowitz , Marco Maggesi)

Let (H, θ) be a strengthened signature, M an endo-functor.
If M has a structure of (left) module over a monad T, then it can be lifted to endow
H(M) with a structure of module over T.

Let T be the initial Id+H algebra. Then T is the initial representation in the sense of H&M.

Note : A shorter proof of this statment could be formalized by using the proof of initiality
in the category of heterogeneous substitution systems, provided we weaken the notion of heterogeneous
substitution system so that the bracket associated to the functor is not unique.
The proof of initiality in the category of "weak" heterogeneous substitution systems is the same
as the one one already proved formally for the standard notion of heterogeneous substitution system.

*)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctorsComposition.


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Local Open Scope cat.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Notation.
Local Open Scope subsys.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.LModules.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MonadsFromSubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.All.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Presheaf.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.LiftingInitial_alt.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.GenMendlerIteration_alt.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.

(** A monad is a pointed endofunctor *)
Definition ptd_from_mon {C:category} (T:Monad C) : category_Ptd C :=
  ((T:functor C C),, η T).

(** Let (Z, e : 1 -> Z) be a pointed endofunctor.
Then e is a morphism (actually the initial morphism) in the category of pointed endofunctors *)


C: category
F: ptd_obj C
is_ptd_mor C (ptd_pt C F)


C: category
F: ptd_obj C
is_ptd_mor C (ptd_pt C F)

  intro c; apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition ptd_mor_pt {C:category} (F:ptd_obj C) : ptd_mor _ (id_Ptd C) F :=
  (ptd_pt _ F ,, is_ptd_mor_pt F).


Local Notation σ := (lm_mult _).


Section SignatureLiftModule.

Context {C D : category} (H : Signature C D C).

(** The forgetful functor from pointed endofunctors to endofunctors *)
Local Notation "'U'" := (functor_ptd_forget C).
(** The category of pointed endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'Ptd'" := (category_Ptd C).
(** The category of endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .

Context (T : Monad C) (M : LModule T C).

Local Notation Mf := (M : functor _ _).

Identifier 'p' now a keyword


(** The pointed functor TT *)
Let  T2 := (ptd_compose _ (p T) (p T)) .

(** The multiplication of a monad is a morphism of pointed endofunctors *)

C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
is_ptd_mor C (μ T)


C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
is_ptd_mor C (μ T)

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
ptd_pt C T2 c · μ T c = ptd_pt C p T c
 
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
ptd_pt C (p T p• p T) c · μ T c = ptd_pt C p T c
 
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
ptd_pt C
  (functor_compose (pr1 p T) (pr1 p T),,
   # (functorial_composition C C C)
     (ptd_pt C p T,, ptd_pt C p T)) c · μ T c =
ptd_pt C p T c
 
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
ptd_pt C
  (functor_compose (pr1 p T) (pr1 p T),,
   # (pre_comp_functor
        (pr1 (functor_identity C,, functor_identity C)))
     (ptd_pt C p T)
   · # (post_comp_functor (pr2 (pr1 p T,, pr1 p T)))
       (ptd_pt C p T)) c · μ T c = ptd_pt C p T c

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
pr1 (η T) c · # (pr1 T) (pr1 (η T) c) · μ T c = η T c

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
pr1 (η T) c · (# (pr1 T) (pr1 (η T) c) · μ T c) =
η T c

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
pr1 (η T) c · (# (pr1 T) (pr1 (η T) c) · μ T c) =
η T c · identity (T c)

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
c: C
# (pr1 T) (pr1 (η T) c) · μ T c = identity (T c)

  apply Monad_law2.
Qed.

Definition ptd_mor_from_μ : ptd_mor _ T2 (p T) := (_ ,, is_ptd_mor_μ).


Let strength_law1_pw M x :=
  nat_trans_eq_pointwise
    (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1 _ (Sig_strength_law1 H ) M) x.

(** A pointwise version of the second strength law with only one identity instead
    of two α_functor *)

C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
∏ (X : [C, C]) (Z Z' : Ptd) (x : C),
(theta H (X ⊗ Z p• Z')
 :
 θ_source H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') ⟹ θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z'))
  x =
(theta H (X ⊗ Z') •• U Z
 :
 pre_composition_functor_data C C D (U Z)
   (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z'))
 ⟹ pre_composition_functor_data C C D (U Z)
     (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z'))) x
· (theta H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)
   :
   θ_source H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)
   ⟹ θ_target H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)) x
· (# H
     (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)
      :
      [C, C]
      ⟦ functor_compose (U Z) (U Z' ∙ X : [C, C]),
      functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X ⟧)
   :
   H (functor_compose (U Z) (U Z' ∙ X : [C, C]))
   ⟹ H (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)) x


C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
∏ (X : [C, C]) (Z Z' : Ptd) (x : C),
(theta H (X ⊗ Z p• Z')
 :
 θ_source H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') ⟹ θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z'))
  x =
(theta H (X ⊗ Z') •• U Z
 :
 pre_composition_functor_data C C D (U Z)
   (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z'))
 ⟹ pre_composition_functor_data C C D (U Z)
     (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z'))) x
· (theta H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)
   :
   θ_source H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)
   ⟹ θ_target H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)) x
· (# H
     (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)
      :
      [C, C]
      ⟦ functor_compose (U Z) (U Z' ∙ X : [C, C]),
      functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X ⟧)
   :
   H (functor_compose (U Z) (U Z' ∙ X : [C, C]))
   ⟹ H (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)) x

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
(theta H (X ⊗ Z p• Z')
 :
 θ_source H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') ⟹ θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z'))
  x =
(theta H (X ⊗ Z') •• U Z
 :
 pre_composition_functor_data C C D (U Z)
   (θ_source H (X ⊗ Z'))
 ⟹ pre_composition_functor_data C C D (U Z)
     (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z'))) x
· (theta H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)
   :
   θ_source H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)
   ⟹ θ_target H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z)) x
· (# H
     (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)
      :
      [C, C]
      ⟦ functor_compose (U Z) (U Z' ∙ X : [C, C]),
      functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X ⟧)
   :
   H (functor_compose (U Z) (U Z' ∙ X : [C, C]))
   ⟹ H (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)) x

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
?b =
(theta H (X ⊗ Z') •• U Z) x
· theta H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z) x
· # H (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)) x

M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
theta H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x = ?b

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
?b =
(theta H (X ⊗ Z') •• U Z) x
· theta H (functor_compose (U Z') X ⊗ Z) x
· # H (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)) x
 apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
             (θ_Strength2_int_implies_θ_Strength2 _
                                                  (Sig_strength_law2 H) X Z Z'
                                                  _
                                                  (identity _) ) x). 
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
theta H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x =
((pr12 H) (X ⊗ Z p• Z')
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X))) x

H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd

nat_trans_eq_pointwise

  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
theta H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x
· identity (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x) =
((pr12 H) (X ⊗ Z p• Z')
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X))) x

  x

Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
identity (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x) =
# (pr1 H) (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X))
  x

  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1

      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
# (pr1 H) (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X))
  x = identity (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x)

 · # (pr1 H)

      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id

  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
# (pr1 H) (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X))
  x = ?b

H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C

  x

Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
?b = identity (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x)

C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
# (pr1 H) (identity (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)) =
?a'

    apply (functor_id H).
  
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
X: [C, C]
Z, Z': Ptd
x: C
identity (H (functor_compose (U Z ∙ U Z') X)) x =
identity (θ_target H (X ⊗ Z p• Z') x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Local Notation θ_nat_2_pw := (θ_nat_2_pointwise _ _ _ H (theta H)).
Local Notation θ_nat_1_pw := (θ_nat_1_pointwise _ _ _ H (theta H) ).


(** The module multiplication is given by

         Θ_M,T        H(σ)
H(M) T ------> H(MT) ------> H(M)

*)
Local Definition lift_lm_mult : [C,D] ⟦ T ∙ H Mf , H Mf⟧ :=
  nat_trans_comp ((theta H) ((M : C ⟶ C),, ptd_from_mon T)) (# H (σ M)).

Local Definition lift_LModule_data : LModule_data T D :=
  tpair (fun x=> [C,D] ⟦  T ∙ x, x⟧) (H Mf) lift_lm_mult.


C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
LModule_laws T lift_LModule_data

nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
∏ c : C,
# lift_LModule_data (μ T c) · σ lift_LModule_data c =
σ lift_LModule_data (T c) · σ lift_LModule_data c

H: Signature C D C

     (identity M
      :

      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =

  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
# lift_LModule_data (μ T c) · σ lift_LModule_data c =
σ lift_LModule_data (T c) · σ lift_LModule_data c

pr2 H (M,, p T) (T c) · # H (σ M) (T c)
· (pr2 H (M,, p T) c · # H (σ M) c)

C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)

 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M

      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
(theta H (M ⊗ p T) •• U p T) c
· theta H (functor_compose (U p T) M ⊗ p T) c
· # H (identity (functor_compose (U p T ∙ U p T) M)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity M ⋆ pr1 ptd_mor_from_μ)) c
· # H (σ M) c =
pr2 H (M,, p T) (T c) · # H (σ M) (T c)
· (pr2 H (M,, p T) c · # H (σ M) c)

C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
(theta H (M ⊗ p T) •• U p T) c
· theta H (functor_compose (U p T) M ⊗ p T) c
· # H (identity (functor_compose (U p T ∙ U p T) M)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity M ⋆ pr1 ptd_mor_from_μ)) c
· # H (σ M) c =
pr2 H (M,, p T) (T c)
· (pr1 (theta H (T ∙ M ⊗ p T)) c
   · pr1 (# H (σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 p T))) c
   · # H (σ M) c)

    
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
pr1 (pr2 H (M ⊗ p T)) (pr1 T c)
· pr2 H (functor_compose T M ⊗ p T) c
· # H
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_composite_data T T) M)) c
· pr1 (# H (nat_trans_id (pr1 M) ⋆ μ T)) c
· # H (σ M) c =
pr2 H (M,, p T) (T c)
· (pr1 (pr2 H (T ∙ M ⊗ p T)) c
   · pr1 (# H (σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T)) c · # H (σ M) c)

c: C
pr1 (pr2 H (M ⊗ p T)) (pr1 T c)
· (pr2 H (functor_compose T M ⊗ p T) c
   · (# H
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data T T) M)) c
      · (pr1 (# H (nat_trans_id (pr1 M) ⋆ μ T)) c
         · # H (σ M) c))) =
pr2 H (M,, p T) (T c)
· (pr1 (pr2 H (T ∙ M ⊗ p T)) c
   · (pr1 (# H (σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T)) c · # H (σ M) c))

     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
?b = pr1 (# H (σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T)) c · # H (σ M) c
 
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
pr1 (# H (σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T)) c · # H (σ M) c = ?b

      apply (functor_comp_pw _ _ H). 
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
# H
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data T T) M)) c
· (pr1 (# H (nat_trans_id (pr1 M) ⋆ μ T)) c
   · # H (σ M) c) = # H (σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T · σ M) c

      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c: C
# H
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data T T) M)) c
· (pr1 (# H (nat_trans_id (pr1 M) ⋆ μ T)) c
   · # H (σ M) c) = ?b

nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data T T)
     M) · (nat_trans_id (pr1 M) ⋆ μ T · σ M) =
σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T · σ M

M: LModule T C

∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_id
   (functor_composite_data
      (functor_composite_data T T) M)
 · (nat_trans_id (pr1 M) ⋆ μ T · σ M)) x =
(σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T · σ M) x

M: LModule T C

nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =

  x
c, x: C
(nat_trans_id
   (functor_composite_data
      (functor_composite_data T T) M)
 · (nat_trans_id (pr1 M) ⋆ μ T · σ M)) x =
(σ M ⋆ nat_trans_id T · σ M) x

    
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c, x: C
identity (M (T (T x)))
· (horcomp_data C C C (functor_compose T T) T M M
     (μ T) (nat_trans_id (pr1 M)) x · σ M x) =
horcomp_data C C C T T (T ∙ M) M (nat_trans_id T)
  (σ M) x · σ M x
 
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c, x: C
identity (M (T (T x)))
· (identity (pr1 M (T (T x))) · # M (μ T x) · σ M x) =
σ M (T x) · # M (identity (T x)) · σ M x

    
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c, x: C
# M (μ T x) · σ M x =
σ M (T x) · # M (identity (T x)) · σ M x

    
C, D: category
H: Signature C D C
T: Monad C
M: LModule T C
T2:= p T p• p T: Ptd
strength_law1_pw:= λ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (θ_Strength1_int_implies_θ_Strength1
     (pr12 H) (Sig_strength_law1 H)
     M) x: ∏ (M : [C, C]) (x : C),
((pr12 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C)
 · # (pr1 H)
     (identity M
      :
      functor_identity C ∙ M
      ⟹ pr1 M)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (θ_source (pr1 H) (M ⊗ id_Ptd C))
  x
c, x: C
# M (μ T x) · σ M x = σ M (T x) · σ M x

    apply LModule_law2.
Qed.

Local Definition lift_lmodule : LModule T D := (lift_LModule_data,, lift_lm_mult_laws).

End SignatureLiftModule.




Section InitialRep.

(** ** Some variables and assumptions *)

Context (C : category) (CP : BinCoproducts C).

Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .
Let CPEndC : BinCoproducts EndC := BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CP.


(** Assume having a signature on [C] *)
Context (H : Signature C C C).
Let θ := theta H.

Local Notation θ_nat_2_pw := (θ_nat_2_pointwise _ _ _ H (theta H)).
Local Notation θ_nat_1_pw := (θ_nat_1_pointwise _ _ _ H (theta H)).

Let Id_H : functor EndC EndC := Id_H C CP H.

Let Alg : category := FunctorAlg Id_H.


(** The category of endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .

Identifier 'p' now a keyword

Local Notation η := @eta_from_alg.

(** Let [T] be a heterogeneous substitution system.
  Then [τ : H T --> T] is a module morphism
 *)

Section TauModuleMorphism.

Context (T : hss CP H).
Local Notation T_mon := (Monad_from_hss _ _ _ T).
Local Notation T_mod := (tautological_LModule T_mon).
Local Notation HT_mod := (lift_lmodule H _ T_mod).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
T: hss CP H
LModule_Mor_laws T_mon (τ T)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
T: hss CP H
LModule_Mor_laws T_mon (τ T)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
T: hss CP H
a: C
τ T (T_mon a) · σ T_mod a = σ HT_mod a · τ T a

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
T: hss CP H
a: C
σ HT_mod a · τ T a = τ T (T_mon a) · σ T_mod a

  (* It is precisely the square diagram satisfied by μ = { id } *)
  exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (fbracket_τ T  (Z:= p T)(identity _ )) a).
Qed.

Definition τ_lmodule_mor :  LModule_Mor  _ _ _ :=
  tpair (λ x, LModule_Mor_laws _ x) _ τ_lmodule_laws.

End TauModuleMorphism.


(**
Let (M, τ_M) be a representation in the sense of Hirschowitz & Maggesi :
      - M is a monad
      - [τ_M : HM ---> M] is a module morphism

Then there exists a unique monad morphism j : T --> M that is compatible with τ_M, τ_T
     where T is the initial HSS.

In other words, T is the initial representation in the sense of H&M

*)


Context (IC : Initial C)
        (CC : Colims_of_shape nat_graph C)
        (HH : is_omega_cocont H).

Let T := InitHSS _ CP IC CC H HH.

Local Notation T_alg := (alg_from_hetsubst _ _ _ (hetsubst_from_hss _ _ _ T)).
Local Notation T_mon := (Monad_from_hss _ _ _ T).
Local Notation T_func := (T_mon : functor _ _).
Local Notation T_hss := (T:hss _ _).


Section fix_a_representation.


Context (M : Monad C).
Local Notation M_mod := (tautological_LModule M).
Local Notation HM_mod := (lift_lmodule H _ M_mod).

Context (τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
Alg


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
Alg

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category

HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
[C, C] ⟦ Id_H M, M ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category

HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
[C, C]
⟦ constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C)
    M, M ⟧
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
[C, C] ⟦ H M, M ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
[C, C]
⟦ constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C)
    M, M ⟧
 apply Monads.η.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
[C, C] ⟦ H M, M ⟧
 apply τ_M.
Defined.

(** j : T --> M is the initial Id+H-algebra morphism *)
Let j : Alg ⟦T_alg, M_alg⟧ := InitialArrow _ M_alg.



C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
Initial [C, C]


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
Initial [C, C]

  apply Initial_functor_precat, IC.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape nat_graph [C, C]


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape nat_graph [C, C]

  apply Colimits.ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape, CC.
Defined.


Let is_omega_cocont_Id_H' := LiftingInitial_alt.is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH.

Local Notation j_mor := ((mor_from_algebra_mor _ j):nat_trans _ _).

(**
  Following Ralph's proof : we want to prove the square diagram for the
  monad morphism induced by
  the initial algebra morphism j : T --> M :
<<
       jj
  TT ------> MM
   |         |
μ_T|         | μ_M
   |         |
   V         V
   T ------> M
       j
>>

The strategy is to show that both paths of the diagram satisfy the characteristic equation of
the same Mendler iterator. We use Lemma 8 from "Heteregenous substitution system revisited"
  (Benedikt Ahrens & Ralph Matthes) with the following parameters :

    X := M
    L Z := Z·T
    F Z := (Id+H) Z

  And for any Z : EndC, h : LZ -> X

    ψ_Z(h)  := [j, τ_M ∘ H h ∘ Θ_Z,(T,η)]

*)

Let L := (pre_composition_functor C C C T_func).
Let X := (M:functor _ _).

(* inspired by LiftingInitial_alt *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
is_omega_cocont L


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
is_omega_cocont L

  apply OmegaCocontFunctors.is_omega_cocont_pre_composition_functor, CC.
Defined.

Let isInitial_precomp' : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC) :=
  LiftingInitial_alt.isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss : isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC).



C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
Z: [C, C]
Core.hset_precategory ⟦ ψ_source X L Z,
ψ_target Id_H X L Z ⟧

j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
Z: [C, C]
h: ψ_source X L Z
functor_composite_data
  (ColimFunctor_data
     (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
        (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))
     (λ a : C,
      CC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
              (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H)) a)))
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H Z)) ⟹ X

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
Z: [C, C]
h: ψ_source X L Z
[C, C] ⟦ `T_alg, X ⟧
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C

j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
Z: [C, C]
h: ψ_source X L Z
[C, C] ⟦ `T_alg ∙ H Z, X ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
Z: [C, C]
h: ψ_source X L Z
[C, C] ⟦ `T_alg, X ⟧
 apply j.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
Z: [C, C]
h: ψ_source X L Z
[C, C] ⟦ `T_alg ∙ H Z, X ⟧
 apply ((θ  (Z ⊗ (p T_hss)))·#H h· (τ_M:nat_trans _ _)).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
is_nat_trans (ψ_source X L) (ψ_target Id_H X L) ψ_pw


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C

HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
is_nat_trans (ψ_source X L) (ψ_target Id_H X L) ψ_pw

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C] ⟦ x, x' ⟧
# (ψ_source X L) a · ψ_pw x' =
ψ_pw x · # (ψ_target Id_H X L) a

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
(ψ_pw x · # (ψ_target Id_H X L) a) f c = ?b

    apply (precompWithBinCoproductArrow C (CP _ _) (CP _ _)
                                        (identity _) (((# H a):nat_trans _ _) (T_func c))). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
(# (ψ_source X L) a · ψ_pw x') f c =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) x'
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) c)) (H x' (T_mon c)))
  (identity
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) x'
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) c))
   · (let X0 := pr1 j in X0) c)
  (# H a (T_mon c)
   · (θ (x ⊗ p T_hss) · # H f · (τ_M : HM_mod ⟹ M_mod))
       c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
(let X0 := pr1 j in X0) c =
identity
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
     (functor_identity C : [C, C]) x'
     ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) c)) · (let X0 := pr1 j in X0) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H

τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
(θ (x' ⊗ p T_hss) · # H (# (ψ_source X L) a f)
 · (τ_M : HM_mod ⟹ M_mod)) c =
# H a (T_mon c)
· (θ (x ⊗ p T_hss) · # H f · (τ_M : HM_mod ⟹ M_mod)) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
(let X0 := pr1 j in X0) c =
identity
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
     (functor_identity C : [C, C]) x'
     ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) c)) · (let X0 := pr1 j in X0) c
 apply pathsinv0,id_left.

      apply (θ_nat_1_pw _ _ a (p T_alg)). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
pr1 (theta H (x' ⊗ p T_alg)) c
· pr1 (# H (a ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 p T_alg))) c
· # H f c =
(θ (x' ⊗ p T_alg) · # H (# (ψ_source X L) a f)) c

(θ (x' ⊗ p T_alg) · # H (# (ψ_source X L) a f)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
pr1 (# H (a ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 p T_alg))) c · # H f c =
# H (# (ψ_source X L) a f) c

M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

:

a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
# H (# (ψ_source X L) a f) = ?a'

      apply (functor_comp H (_:EndC⟦ T_mon ∙ x', T_mon ∙ x⟧)).

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H

τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

     CP H)

:

x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c: C
pr1 (# H (a ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 p T_alg))) c · # H f c =
(# H (# (opp_precat.functor_opp L) a) · # H f) c

f: ψ_source X L x

(a ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 p T_alg)) x0 =

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c, c': C
(a ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 p T_alg)) c' =
# (opp_precat.functor_opp L) a c'
· identity ((T_mon ∙ x) c')

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
x, x': opp_precat.opp_precat [C, C]
a: x' ⟹ x
f: ψ_source X L x
c, c': C
# x (nat_trans_id (pr1 p T_alg) c') =
identity ((T_mon ∙ x) c')

    apply (functor_id x).
Qed.

Local Definition ψ  : (PreShv EndC)⟦ψ_source(D:=[C,C]) X L , ψ_target(D:=[C,C]) Id_H X L⟧ :=
  (ψ_pw ,, ψ_nt).

(** Uniqueness of the Mendler iterator characteristized by its equation *)
Local Definition uniq_iter :
  ∃! h : [C, C] ⟦ L `T_hss, X ⟧,
         # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h = (ψ:nat_trans _ _) `T_alg h
  :=
    GenMendlerIteration InitialEndC Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC Id_H
                        is_omega_cocont_Id_H' (D:=[C,C]) X _ isInitial_precomp' HL ψ.


(** The previous characteristic equation can be split as an equality between coproduct of arrows :
- h ∘ η_T = j_mor
- h ∘ τ_T = τ_M ∘ H h ∘ Θ_T,T

where [η_T, τ_T] : Id + HT --> T
*)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
(∏ x : C,
 BinCoproductIn1
   (CP
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
         (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
         (T_mon x))
      ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
 · (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
    :
    L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · h x = j_mor x)
→ (∏ x : C,
   BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
           (T_mon x))
        ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
   · (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
      :
      L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · h x =
   (θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
    :
    θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
    ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
   · (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · τ_M x)
  → # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h =
    (ψ : ψ_source X L ⟹ ψ_target Id_H X L) `T_alg h


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
(∏ x : C,
 BinCoproductIn1
   (CP
      (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
         (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
         (T_mon x))
      ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
 · (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
    :
    L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · h x = j_mor x)
→ (∏ x : C,
   BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
           (T_mon x))
        ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
   · (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
      :
      L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · h x =
   (θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
    :
    θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
    ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
   · (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · τ_M x)
  → # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h =
    (ψ : ψ_source X L ⟹ ψ_target Id_H X L) `T_alg h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h =
(ψ : ψ_source X L ⟹ ψ_target Id_H X L) `T_alg h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
∏ x : C,
(# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h) x = ψ `T_alg h x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
(# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h) x = ψ `T_alg h x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
(# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h) x = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
?b = ψ `T_alg h x

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C

j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))

   :

h x = j_mor x

BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
(# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h) x = ?b
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
(# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · h) x = ?b0

H: Signature C C C

Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category

  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
?b0 = ?b

τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

X:= M: C ⟶ C
