:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x = ?f'

      apply BinCoproductArrowEta. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
     (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
           ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
        (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
   · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
           ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
        (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
   · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x) · h x = ?b

      apply postcompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
     (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
           ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
        (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
   · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x · h x)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
           ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
        (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
   · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x · h x) = ψ `T_alg h x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
     (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
· # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x · h x =
(let X0 := pr1 j in X0) x
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
     (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
· # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_hss) · # H h · (τ_M : HM_mod ⟹ M_mod))
  x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
     (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
· # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x · h x =
(let X0 := pr1 j in X0) x
 apply hB1.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
h: L `T_alg ⟹ `M_alg
hB1: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x = j_mor x
hB2: ∏ x : C,
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        (T_mon x))
     ((H (T_mon : C ⟶ C) : C ⟶ C) (T_mon x)))
· (# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
   :
   L (Id_H `T_alg) ⟹ L `T_alg) x · 
h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 :
 θ_source H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)
 ⟹ θ_target H (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg)) x
· (# H h : H (L `T_alg) ⟹ H `M_alg) x · 
τ_M x
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T_alg
        ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x))
     (H `T_alg ((T_mon : C ⟶ C) x)))
· # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x · h x =
(θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_hss) · # H h · (τ_M : HM_mod ⟹ M_mod))
  x
 apply hB2.
Qed.


Let τT := τ_lmodule_mor T.

(** j is a morphism of representation.
    It is exactly the 'H' part of the Id + H algebra morphism diagram *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
τT x · j_mor x =
(# H j_mor : H `T_alg ⟹ H `M_alg) x · τ_M x


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
τT x · j_mor x =
(# H j_mor : H `T_alg ⟹ H `M_alg) x · τ_M x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) x
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T_alg x · j x) =
# H j x · τ_M x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) x
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T_alg x · j x) =
?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
?b = # H j x · τ_M x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) x
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T_alg x · j x) =
?b
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
alg_map
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H) T_alg x · j x = ?f'

    apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (algebra_mor_commutes _ _ _ j) x). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) x
· (# Id_H j · alg_map Id_H M_alg) x = # H j x · τ_M x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) x
· # Id_H j x · alg_map Id_H M_alg x = # H j x · τ_M x

j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) x
· # Id_H j x · alg_map Id_H M_alg x = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
?b = # H j x · τ_M x

BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP

· # Id_H j x · alg_map Id_H M_alg x = ?b
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) x
· # Id_H j x = ?f'

    apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
(# H j
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `M_alg)
        (H `M_alg))) x · alg_map Id_H M_alg x =
# H j x · τ_M x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
# H j x
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C) `M_alg) (H `M_alg)) x
   · alg_map Id_H M_alg x) = # H j x · τ_M x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `M_alg) (H `M_alg)) x
· alg_map Id_H M_alg x = τ_M x

  apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
Qed.

(** j satisfies the η-related diagram of monad morphism.
         This is Id part of the Id+H-algebra morphism diagram *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
∏ a : C, Monads.η T_mon a · j_mor a = Monads.η M a


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

        CC

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph

:

  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
∏ a : C, Monads.η T_mon a · j_mor a = Monads.η M a

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
a: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg) (H `T_alg)) a
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
        (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP)
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T_alg a · j a) =
Monads.η M a

τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

:

τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

BinCoproductIn1
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
a: C
# (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C))
  j a
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C) `M_alg) (H `M_alg)) a
   · alg_map Id_H M_alg a) = Monads.η M a

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
a: C
# (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C))
  j a
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C) `M_alg) (H `M_alg)) a
   · alg_map Id_H M_alg a) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
a: C
?b = Monads.η M a

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

        CC

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)

  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

# (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C))
  j a
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
        (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
           (functor_identity C) `M_alg) (H `M_alg)) a
   · alg_map Id_H M_alg a) = ?b
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
a: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `M_alg) (H `M_alg)) a
· alg_map Id_H M_alg a = ?f'

    apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
a: C
# (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C))
  j a · Monads.η M a = Monads.η M a

  apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
category_Ptd C ⟦ ptd_from_mon T_mon, ptd_from_mon M ⟧

     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C

:

  (lift_lmodule H T_mon

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
(λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
 is_ptd_mor C α) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M
 apply j.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
(λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
 is_ptd_mor C α) (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
x: C
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_mon T_mon) x
· (let X0 := pr1 j in X0) x =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_mon M) x

    apply j_mon_η.
Defined.



(** j is a monad morphism (following Ralph's proof). For the square diagram,
     we show that both parts satisfies the same Mendler iterator characteristic equation *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
· ((μ T_mon : [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ T_mon, T_mon ⟧) · j_mor) =
(ψ : ψ_source X L ⟹ ψ_target Id_H X L) `T_alg
  ((μ T_mon : [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ T_mon, T_mon ⟧) · j_mor)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
· ((μ T_mon : [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ T_mon, T_mon ⟧) · j_mor) =
(ψ : ψ_source X L ⟹ ψ_target Id_H X L) `T_alg
  ((μ T_mon : [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ T_mon, T_mon ⟧) · j_mor)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (μ T_mon · j) x = j x
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg 
        (T_mon x)) 
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · 
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x · 
(μ T_mon · j) x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x · # H (μ T_mon · j) x · τ_M x

  (CP

        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (μ T_mon · j) x = j x

  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)

  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧

?b = j x

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Signature C C C

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:

  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,

     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· μ T_mon x = ?f'

      apply (Monad_law1 (T:=T_mon)). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
identity (T_mon x) · j x = j x

    apply id_left.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (μ T_mon · j) x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x · # H (μ T_mon · j) x · τ_M x

CP: BinCoproducts C

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
σ (lift_lmodule H T_mon (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  x · τT x · j x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x · # H (μ T_mon · j) x · τ_M x

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph

  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,

ptd_from_mon T_mon,

  x · (τT x · j x) =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x · # H (μ T_mon · j) x · τ_M x

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
theta H
  ((tautological_LModule T_mon : C ⟶ C),,
   ptd_from_mon T_mon) x
· (# H (σ (tautological_LModule T_mon)) x
   · (τT x · j x)) =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x · # H (μ T_mon · j) x · τ_M x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
theta H
  (tautological_LModule T_mon,, ptd_from_mon T_mon) x
· (# H (σ (tautological_LModule T_mon)) x
   · (τT x · j x)) =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x · (# H (μ T_mon · j) x · τ_M x)

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

:

((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)

  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H

M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
