Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# H (σ (tautological_LModule T_mon)) x · (τT x · j x) =
# H (μ T_mon) x · (# H j x · τ_M x)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
τT x · j x = # H j x · τ_M x

    apply j_mor_rep.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
· ((j_mor ø T_mon
    :
    [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ `T_alg, T_mon ∙ `M_alg ⟧)
   · (M ∘ j_mor : [C, C] ⟦ `T_alg ∙ M, `M_alg ∙ M ⟧)
   · μ M) =
(ψ : ψ_source X L ⟹ ψ_target Id_H X L) `T_alg
  ((j_mor ø T_mon
    :
    [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ `T_alg, T_mon ∙ `M_alg ⟧)
   · (M ∘ j_mor : [C, C] ⟦ `T_alg ∙ M, `M_alg ∙ M ⟧)
   · μ M)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg)
· ((j_mor ø T_mon
    :
    [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ `T_alg, T_mon ∙ `M_alg ⟧)
   · (M ∘ j_mor : [C, C] ⟦ `T_alg ∙ M, `M_alg ∙ M ⟧)
   · μ M) =
(ψ : ψ_source X L ⟹ ψ_target Id_H X L) `T_alg
  ((j_mor ø T_mon
    :
    [C, C] ⟦ T_mon ∙ `T_alg, T_mon ∙ `M_alg ⟧)
   · (M ∘ j_mor : [C, C] ⟦ `T_alg ∙ M, `M_alg ∙ M ⟧)
   · μ M)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x = j x
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor 
        [C, C] 
        [C, C] 
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg 
        (T_mon x)) 
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · 
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x · 
τ_M x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x = j x
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)) x · μ M x = j x

     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C

?b = j x

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC

  nat_graph

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:

  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)

 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,

ptd_from_mon T_mon,

BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon) x = ?f'

      apply j_mon_η. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
Monads.η M (T_mon x) · (M ∘ j) x · μ M x = j x

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
?b = j x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
Monads.η M (T_mon x) · (M ∘ j) x · μ M x = ?b

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

:

     (tautological_LModule T_mon))

((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :

   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦

      apply (nat_trans_ax (Monads.η M )). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# (functor_identity C) (pr1 j x)
· Monads.η M (`M_alg x) · μ M x = j x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# (functor_identity C) (pr1 j x)
· Monads.η M (`M_alg x) · μ M x =
j x · identity (`M_alg x)

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

        CC

  (lift_lmodule H T_mon

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x · τ_M x

        CC

     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)) x · μ M x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x · τ_M x

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T_alg (T_mon x))
     (H T_mon (T_mon x))) · # L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) x
· (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)) x · μ M x = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
?b =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x · 
τ_M x

  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# H j (T_mon x) · (τ_M (T_mon x) · (M ∘ j) x) = ?f'

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
τ_M (T_mon x) · (M ∘ j) x = ?f'

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
?f' = τ_M (T_mon x) · (M ∘ j) x

      apply (nat_trans_ax τ_M). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# H j (T_mon x)
· (# HM_mod (pr1 j x) · τ_M (`M_alg x)) · μ M x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x · τ_M x

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
?b =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x · 
τ_M x

j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# H j (T_mon x) · # HM_mod (pr1 j x) · σ HM_mod x
· τ_M x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x · τ_M x

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:

θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# HM_mod (pr1 j x)
· theta H (M_mod,, ptd_from_mon M) x = ?f'

      apply (θ_nat_2_pw _ _ _ j_ptd). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# H j (T_mon x)
· (pr1 (theta H (M_mod ⊗ ptd_from_mon T_mon)) x
   · pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
   · # H (σ M_mod) x) =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x

  nat_graph

  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
# H j (T_mon x)
· (pr1 (theta H (M_mod ⊗ ptd_from_mon T_mon)) x
   · pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
   · # H (σ M_mod) x) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
?b =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x

        CC

           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C

     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

 :

   · pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
   · # H (σ M_mod) x) = ?b

· pr1 (theta H (M_mod ⊗ ptd_from_mon T_mon)) x = ?f'

      apply (θ_nat_1_pw _ _ j_mor (ptd_from_mon T_mon)). 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
pr1 (theta H (`T_alg ⊗ ptd_from_mon T_mon)) x
· pr1
    (# H (j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))))
    x · pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
· # H (σ M_mod) x =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
pr1 (theta H (`T_alg ⊗ ptd_from_mon T_mon)) x
· (pr1
     (# H
        (j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))))
     x
   · (pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
      · # H (σ M_mod) x)) =
θ (`T_alg ⊗ p T_alg) x
· # H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j · μ M)) x

  nat_graph

pr1
  (# H (j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))))
  x
· (pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
   · # H (σ M_mod) x) =
# H (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j · μ M)) x

  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
pr1
  (# H (j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))))
  x
· (pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
   · # H (σ M_mod) x) =
(# H (j ø T_mon) · (# H (M ∘ j) · # H (μ M))) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
pr1
  (# H (j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))))
  x · pr1 (# H (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd)) x
· # H (σ M_mod) x =
(# H (j ø T_mon) · # H (M ∘ j) · # H (μ M)) x

CP: BinCoproducts C

IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)

((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧

j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))
· identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd = j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x: C
∏ x : C,
(j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))
 · identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd) x =
(j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
(j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))
 · identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd) y =
(j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)) y

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
(j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))
 · identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd) y = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
?b = (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)) y

 · identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd) y = ?b
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
(j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))) y = ?f'

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
(j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))) y = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
?b = ?f'

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
(j ⋆ nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon))) y = ?b
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
# (`M_alg) (nat_trans_id (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon)) y) =
?f'0

        apply functor_id. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
j (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon) y)
· identity (`M_alg (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon) y)) = 
?f'

      apply id_right. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
j (pr1 (ptd_from_mon T_mon) y)
· (identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd) y =
(j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j)) y

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
x, y: C
(identity M_mod ⋆ pr1 j_ptd) y = (M ∘ j) y

    apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
Monad_Mor_laws j


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C

Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]

M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
Monad_Mor_laws j

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
∏ a : C,
μ T_mon a · j a = j (T_mon a) · # M (j a) · μ M a
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
∏ a : C, Monads.η T_mon a · j a = Monads.η M a

H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category

  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)

  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧

  [C, C]

  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)

:

τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦
