C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
μ T_mon · j = j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · (μ T_mon · j) =
ψ `T_alg (μ T_mon · j)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial 
     (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain 
           (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape
  nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) =
ψ `T_alg (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · (μ T_mon · j) =
ψ `T_alg (μ T_mon · j)
 exact j_mon_square_eq1.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
# L (alg_map Id_H T_alg) · (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M) =
ψ `T_alg (j ø T_mon · (M ∘ j) · μ M)
 exact j_mon_square_eq2.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Signature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Alg:= FunctorAlg Id_H: category
IC: Initial C
CC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
HH: is_omega_cocont H
T:= InitHSS C CP IC CC H HH: hss_category CP H
M: Monad C
τ_M: LModule_Mor M HM_mod M_mod
j:= InitialArrow
  (colimAlgInitial (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
     (is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH)
     (ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C
        CC
        (initChain (Initial_functor_precat C C IC)
           (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C CP H))))
  M_alg: Alg ⟦ T_alg, M_alg ⟧
InitialEndC:= Initial_functor_precat C C IC: Initial [C, C]
Colims_of_shape_nat_graph_EndC:= ColimsFunctorCategory_of_shape nat_graph C C CC: Colims_of_shape
  nat_graph 
  [C, C]
is_omega_cocont_Id_H':= is_omega_cocont_Id_H C CP H HH: is_omega_cocont
  (SubstitutionSystems.Id_H C
     CP H)
L:= ℓ (T_mon : C ⟶ C): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X:= M: C ⟶ C
isInitial_precomp':= isInitial_pre_comp C IC p T_hss
:
isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC): isInitial [C, C] (L InitialEndC)
τT:= τ_lmodule_mor T: LModule_Mor T_mon
  (lift_lmodule H T_mon
     (tautological_LModule T_mon))
  (tautological_LModule T_mon)
j_ptd:= (let X0 := pr1 j in X0),,
((λ x : C, j_mon_η x)
 :
 (λ α : ptd_from_mon T_mon ⟹ ptd_from_mon M,
  is_ptd_mor C α) 
   (let X0 := pr1 j in X0)): category_Ptd C ⟦ 
ptd_from_mon T_mon, 
ptd_from_mon M ⟧
∏ a : C, Monads.η T_mon a · j a = Monads.η M a
 apply j_mon_η.
Qed.

Definition j_mon : Monad_Mor T_mon M :=   _ ,, j_mon_laws.

End fix_a_representation.

(** TODO:

  To assemble the above results into a concise statement,
  we would need to define the category of representations
  of a signature (H,θ).

*)

End InitialRep.
